label: Pricing sheet 2026 · rate card & comparable engagements
note: Stand-in for what a live pricing connector (MCP) would return: past engagements with realised price + margin. lib/offers.ts matches a whitespace need to the closest comparables and derives an indicative range — it never invents a point price.

comparables.offering: Implementation & adoption programme — embedded delivery of a strategy roll-out
Change-management & organisational adoption support for a transformation
Implementation & change support post-recommendation — hands-on delivery, not just advice
Commercial due diligence for a mid-market acquisition
Target operating-model design, on paper (recommendation only)
